title: Double Trouble
description: Two theories have been published. Your aspect clues fully establish the truth about both ingredients — check each claim and clear any contradiction from the board.

hints.text: Your clues fully establish the true aspects of ing1 and ing6. Compare each publication's claimed alchemical against the clues — any colour where signs differ is a valid apprentice debunk target.

Ingredient 1: true npN vs claimed pNn. R and G both disprove (− vs +, and + vs −). Ingredient 6: true Ppn vs claimed nPp. R and B both disprove (+ vs −, and − vs +). Any valid colour for each gives you a 2-step plan.
Two-step plan: ① Apprentice on ingredient 1 — reveal R (or G). ② Apprentice on ingredient 6 — reveal R (or B). Steps can be done in either order.
